goal: Define an original three-tier card battle operation model for battleV2 that gives tier 1/2/3 cards distinct in-battle roles, trigger windows, and pacing hooks while staying inside the repository's existing phase skeleton and avoiding external structure imitation.
constraints: Do not introduce shop/XP/triple-merge, auto-battler-equivalent, or externally mirrored progression structures.
Do not modify runtime battle code during this task; this task is design alignment and implementation-facing documentation only.
All tier operation rules must attach to the current battleV2 skeleton: ming_bian, an_mou, reveal, resolve, topic, writing, playerLevel, and deck tier quota.
The design must stay grounded in the current 170-card corpus and existing card types/effect kinds.
deliverables: A project design note defining tier 1/2/3 battle identities, trigger windows, and how each card type should behave within those tiers.
A concise implementation-facing section describing what future runtime hooks or metadata would be sufficient if this design is later implemented.
If a durable design decision is made, record it in repository knowledge.
